goal: Migrate Olivine City exterior + Gym + Cafe + Lighthouse 1F-2F — the final migration boundary for existing engine content; evaluate current map layout against canonical JSON data, preserve what aligns, migrate what does not, and establish the full warp graph for the Olivine arc
abstract_tasks: Migrate olivine_city: 40x36-tile town (johto tileset), connections (north to route_39 offset 5; west to route_40 offset -9), 11 warps including olivine_pokecenter_1f (13,21), olivine_gym (10,11), olivine_tims_house (25,11), olivine_house_beta (0,0 inaccessible), olivine_punishment_speech_house (29,11), olivine_good_rod_house (13,15), olivine_cafe (7,21), olivine_mart (19,17 warp 2), olivine_lighthouse_1f (29,27), olivine_port_passage x2 (19,27 and 20,27); register shared templates for olivine_pokecenter_1f and olivine_mart; rival coord_event at (13,12)/(13,13) for SCENE_OLIVINECITY_RIVAL_ENCOUNTER; flypoint callback sets ENGINE_FLYPOINT_OLIVINE; verify tile layout against pokecrystal OlivineCity.blk especially water south edge and lighthouse southeast position

Migrate olivine_gym: 10x16-tile gym (gym tileset), no trainers, no puzzle; Jasmine at (5,3) conditional on EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM via EVENT_OLIVINE_GYM_JASMINE; Gym Guide at (7,13) with three-state dialogue (Jasmine absent / Jasmine returned pre-battle / post-battle); two gym statues at bg_events (3,13) and (6,13) using OlivineGymStatue script checking ENGINE_MINERALBADGE; Jasmine team: 2x Magnemite Lv30 + Steelix Lv35 with moves (Iron Tail/Screech/Rock Throw/Sandstorm); badge: Mineral Badge (ENGINE_MINERALBADGE); TM23 Iron Tail (EVENT_GOT_TM23_IRON_TAIL); post-badge side effect OlivineGymActivateRockets checking badge count; gate: gym battle unavailable until EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM set

Migrate olivine_cafe: 8x8-tile diner (house tileset), 3 NPCs: Strength Sailor at (4,3) gives HM04 Strength on first talk (EVENT_GOT_HM04_STRENGTH gate), Fishing Guru walks up/down at (7,3) with flavor dialogue, Sailor at (6,6) with food dialogue; exit warps at (2,7) and (3,7) to olivine_city warp 7; HM04 Strength is the only item, no item balls

Migrate olivine_lighthouse_1f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE building, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE, no trainers; 2 NPCs: Sailor at (8,2) standing with lore dialogue, Pokefan F at (16,9) walks up/down with lighthouse history; 5 warps: (10,17)+(11,17) to olivine_city warp 9 (two exit tiles); (3,11) to olivine_lighthouse_2f warp 1 (west stair); (16,13)+(17,13) to olivine_lighthouse_2f warps 3/4 (east stairs); verify against OlivineLighthouse1F.asm

Migrate olivine_lighthouse_2f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; 2 trainers: Sailor Huey at (9,3) facing right line_of_sight 3 (Poliwag+Poliwhirl Lv18, phone-rematch system with 4 escalating teams keyed to EVENT_CLEARED_RADIO_TOWER/EVENT_BEAT_ELITE_FOUR/EVENT_RESTORED_POWER_TO_KANTO, Huey4 rewards Protein), Gentleman Alfred at (17,8) facing left line_of_sight 3 (Noctowl Lv20, after-battle text hints about sick Pokemon and Cianwood Pharmacy); 6 warps: (3,11) to 1f warp 3; (5,3) to 3f warp 2; (16,13)+(17,13) to 1f warps 4/5; (16,11)+(17,11) to 3f warps 4/5; verify hole-navigation layout and staircase positions match OlivineLighthouse2F.asm

Register olivine_port_passage as shared special interior connecting olivine_city to olivine_port; register olivine_tims_house, olivine_house_beta (inaccessible), olivine_punishment_speech_house, olivine_good_rod_house as GenericHouse shared templates with minimal warp destination data

Verify existing engine maps against JSON: for each of the 5 areas compare tile layout rows, warp coordinates (x,y), NPC positions, and trainer teams; document any discrepancies found; keep old data only where it matches pokecrystal-master ASM exactly; migrate to JSON-canonical data where it does not

Write tests: confirm player can warp into all Olivine City buildings; confirm Olivine Cafe gives HM04 Strength exactly once; confirm Jasmine is absent from Gym before lighthouse quest; confirm Rival scene fires exactly once at (13,12)/(13,13); confirm Route 39 to Olivine City border stitches correctly (offset 5 north connection)

source_data.area_data_summary: olivine_city: 40x36 tiles, johto tileset, 11 warps, 4 NPCs (Sailor1 at 26,27; Youngster at 20,13; Sailor2 at 17,21; Rival at 10,11 SCENE_OLIVINECITY_RIVAL_ENCOUNTER), 7 signs, mart inventory 13 items (Ultra Ball through Super Potion), connections north(route_39 offset 5)/west(route_40 offset -9), water south edge. olivine_gym: 10x16 tiles, gym tileset, no puzzle, no sub-trainers; Jasmine at (5,3) Steel type Lv30/30/35 team, Mineral Badge, TM23 Iron Tail, OlivineGymActivateRockets side effect. olivine_cafe: 8x8 tiles, house tileset, HM04 Strength from Sailor NPC (EVENT_GOT_HM04_STRENGTH), Fishing Guru walk_up_down, Sailor at table. olivine_lighthouse_1f: 20x18 tiles, TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE, no trainers, 2 NPCs (Sailor lore at 8,2; Pokefan F history at 16,9), 3 staircase routes to 2F, 2 door exits to city at (10,17)/(11,17). olivine_lighthouse_2f: 20x18 tiles, TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; Sailor Huey (9,3) Poliwag+Poliwhirl Lv18 phone-rematch 4 escalating teams including Politoed+Poliwrath Lv38 at Kanto stage with Protein reward; Gentleman Alfred (17,8) Noctowl Lv20 no rematch after-text hints Cianwood Pharmacy; 6 warps bridging 1F and 3F with hole-navigation floor layout.

unstructured_notes: Much of this map was already built in a previous agentic design experiment. This is the FINAL migration boundary. Rather than delete the existing implementation, carefully evaluate the current map layout against the new canonical data. Keep what aligns, migrate what does not. Key risk areas: (1) olivine_city warp IDs must match exactly — the olivine_port_passage uses warps 10/11 (two doors), olivine_lighthouse_1f uses warp 9; mis-numbered warps will cause warp loops. (2) Jasmine in the gym is entirely absent until EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM — the engine must support NPC absence via event flag, not just invisible-but-present. (3) Lighthouse 2F hole-navigation layout means the east stairs at rows 11 and 13 go in OPPOSITE vertical directions (row 11 up to 3F, row 13 down to 1F) — this non-obvious design must be verified. (4) Sailor Huey's rematch system requires the phone registry and 4 distinct trainer constants (SAILOR_HUEY1 through SAILOR_HUEY4); verify the phone contact system can handle this before implementing. Olivine Cafe is the only source of HM04 Strength in Johto — this HM gates several later areas (Cianwood Gym boulders, Ice Path boulders, Blackthorn Gym 2F boulders, Victory Road). Its delivery must be reliable.
technical_debt_notes: Much of this map was already built in a previous agentic design experiment. This is the FINAL migration boundary. Rather than delete the existing implementation, carefully evaluate the current map layout against the new canonical data. Keep what aligns, migrate what doesn't.

goal: Migrate Olivine Lighthouse upper floors 3F-6F and Olivine Port — completing the Glitter Lighthouse climb through to Jasmine and Amphy on 6F, plus the S.S. Aqua port with its pre/post-Hall-of-Fame NPC swap system
abstract_tasks: Migrate olivine_lighthouse_3f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; 3 trainers: Sailor Terrell (9,2) facing down LOS 1 (Poliwhirl Lv20, after-text references Jasmine switching from Rock to Steel type), Gentleman Preston (13,5) facing right LOS 4 (2x Growlithe Lv18, after-text confirms Jasmine used to use Onix), Bird Keeper Theo (3,9) facing up LOS 3 (5x Pidgey Lv15-19, uses SPRITE_YOUNGSTER in ASM despite BIRD_KEEPER class — preserve this quirk); 1 item ball: Ether at (8,2) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_3F_ETHER; 9 warps: (5,3) to 2f warp 2 down; (13,3) to 4f warp 1 up; (8,3)+(9,3) to 4f warps 7/8 up; (9,5) to 4f warp 4 up; (16,9)+(17,9) to 4f warps 5/6 up; (16,11)+(17,11) to 2f warps 5/6 down; verify all 9 warp event positions match OlivineLighthouse3F.asm

Migrate olivine_lighthouse_4f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; 2 trainers: Sailor Kent (7,14) facing left LOS 3 (2x Krabby Lv18/20 TRAINERTYPE_MOVES with BubbleBeam/Leer/ViceGrip/Harden, after-text directs player explicitly to Cianwood Pharmacy), Lass Connie (11,2) facing down LOS 1 (Marill Lv21, after-text mentions praying for Amphy); 10 warps: (13,3) to 3f warp 1 down; (8,3)+(9,3) to 3f warps 8/9 down; (9,5) to 3f warp 3 down; (16,9)+(17,9) to 3f warps 6/7 down; (3,5) to 5f warp 2 up; (9,7) to 5f warp 3 up; (16,7)+(17,7) to 5f warps 4/5 up; verify all 10 warp positions match OlivineLighthouse4F.asm

Migrate olivine_lighthouse_5f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; 2 trainers: Sailor Ernest (8,11) spinrandom_fast LOS 3 (Machop+Machop+Poliwhirl Lv18, seen-text references wanting to fight Jasmine), Bird Keeper Denis (8,3) facing left LOS 4 (Spearow+Fearow+Spearow Lv18/20/18, uses SPRITE_YOUNGSTER sprite same quirk as 3F Theo, after-text mentions Cianwood); 3 item balls: Rare Candy (15,12) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_5F_RARE_CANDY, Super Repel (6,15) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_5F_SUPER_REPEL, TM Swagger (2,13) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_5F_TM_SWAGGER; 1 hidden item: Hyper Potion bg_event (3,13) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_5F_HIDDEN_HYPER_POTION; 7 warps: (3,5) to 4f warp 2 down; (9,7) to 4f warp 3 down; (16,7)+(17,7) to 4f warps 9/10 down; (9,15) to 6f warp 1 up; (16,5)+(17,5) to 6f warps 2/3 up

Migrate olivine_lighthouse_6f: 20x18-tile TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE, MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY (critical: 6F uses different music track from all lower floors to create atmospheric shift); 2 key NPCs: Jasmine at (8,8) using EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_JASMINE flag (disappears after quest), script delivers SecretPotion sidequest — first visit sets EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS, if player has SECRETPOTION triggers full cutscene (MUSIC_HEAL, FadeOutToWhite x2, Amphy bounce animation, Jasmine leave-movement based on VAR_FACING, sets EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM, clears EVENT_OLIVINE_GYM_JASMINE); Amphy at (9,8) using SPRITE_MONSTER (sick: Pa...paloo cry via PlaySlowCry, healthy: normal cry + FadeOutToWhite x2); 1 item ball: Super Potion (3,4) EVENT_OLIVINE_LIGHTHOUSE_6F_SUPER_POTION; 3 warps all going DOWN to 5F: (9,15) to 5f warp 1; (16,5)+(17,5) to 5f warps 6/7; no upward warps — this is the top floor

Migrate olivine_port: 20x36-tile port interior (port tileset); 7 NPCs split into pre/post-Hall-of-Fame groups using event flags: pre-HOF group uses EVENT_OLIVINE_PORT_SPRITES_BEFORE_HALL_OF_FAME (Sailor guard at 7,15 blocks pier, 2 Fishing Gurus at 4,14 and 13,14); post-HOF group uses EVENT_OLIVINE_PORT_SPRITES_AFTER_HALL_OF_FAME (Sailor boarding agent at 6,15 initiates ticket check, Youngster at 4,15, CooltrainerF at 11,15); Sailor gangway NPC at (7,23) visible during boarding; 2 warps: (11,7) to olivine_port_passage warp 5; (7,23) to fast_ship_1f warp 1 (post-game only); 1 hidden item: Protein bg_event at (1,22) EVENT_OLIVINE_PORT_HIDDEN_PROTEIN; coord_event at (7,15) for SCENE_OLIVINEPORT_ASK_ENTER_SHIP checking S.S. TICKET and day-of-week schedule (Monday/Friday only after first trip); SCENE_OLIVINEPORT_LEAVE_SHIP handling departure cutscene and EVENT_TEMPORARY_UNTIL_MAP_RELOAD_1

Verify 6F music constant: confirm MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY is the correct identifier for the melancholic track used on 6F — this is distinct from MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE used on floors 1F-5F; verify against pokecrystal blocks.asm

Write tests: climb all 6 lighthouse floors bottom to top confirming warp deposit coordinates; confirm Jasmine absent from 6F after EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM; confirm SecretPotion quest triggers EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS on first speak; confirm olivine_port pre-HOF guard blocks pier; confirm Sailor Huey rematch teams scale correctly with story progression flags

source_data.area_data_summary: olivine_lighthouse_3f: 20x18 tiles, 3 trainers (Terrell Poliwhirl Lv20/Preston 2x Growlithe Lv18/Theo 5x Pidgey Lv15-19 SPRITE_YOUNGSTER), Ether item ball at (8,2), 9 warp events with complex multi-path staircase system. olivine_lighthouse_4f: 20x18 tiles, 2 trainers (Kent 2x Krabby TRAINERTYPE_MOVES hints Cianwood/Connie Marill Lv21), 10 warp events — highest staircase density in tower. olivine_lighthouse_5f: 20x18 tiles, 2 trainers (Ernest 3-mon/Denis 3-mon both SPRITE_YOUNGSTER), 3 item balls (Rare Candy/Super Repel/TM Swagger), 1 hidden item (Hyper Potion), 7 warps. olivine_lighthouse_6f: 20x18 tiles, MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY (not MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE), Jasmine key NPC (SecretPotion quest deliver/receive/cutscene), Amphy SPRITE_MONSTER sick/healthy state, Super Potion item ball, 3 down-warps only (top floor). olivine_port: 20x36 tiles, 7 NPCs in two event-flag-gated groups (pre/post Hall of Fame), S.S. Aqua boarding system (S.S. TICKET required, Monday/Friday schedule, first trip bypasses schedule), hidden Protein at (1,22), coord_event boarding prompt at (7,15) with SCENE_OLIVINEPORT_ASK_ENTER_SHIP/SCENE_OLIVINEPORT_LEAVE_SHIP.

unstructured_notes: Lighthouse upper floors (3F-6F) may exist in the old engine in a partial state. Evaluate each floor against pokecrystal-master ASM before assuming the old data is correct. Critical 6F detail: the music change from MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE to MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY at the top floor is intentional atmosphere design — do not normalize it to MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE. The SPRITE_YOUNGSTER quirk on Bird Keeper Theo (3F) and Bird Keeper Denis (5F) is a pokecrystal source artifact that must be preserved for 1:1 fidelity — these trainers look like Youngsters but their trainer class is BIRD_KEEPER for prize money purposes. The SecretPotion cutscene on 6F is one of the most elaborate in the game: MUSIC_HEAL plays mid-cutscene, two FadeOutToWhite calls, Amphy bounce animation, and Jasmine's exit movement varies by VAR_FACING — three different movement scripts exist in ASM. Olivine Port is predominantly post-game content (S.S. Aqua) but the map itself is accessible from the city's port passage at any time. The pre/post-HOF NPC swap using event flags must avoid a frame where both groups are simultaneously visible.
technical_debt_notes: Much of this map was already built in a previous agentic design experiment. This is the FINAL migration boundary. Rather than delete the existing implementation, carefully evaluate the current map layout against the new canonical data. Keep what aligns, migrate what doesn't.

goal: QA audit of the Olivine block — verify Groups 31-32 migration against pokecrystal-master source; validate the full lighthouse climb, SecretPotion quest chain, Jasmine gym gate, and port NPC swap correctness
abstract_tasks: Verify Olivine City warp graph: enter each of the 11 warp destinations from Olivine City and confirm the player arrives at the correct building and the exit warp deposits back at the correct tile in Olivine City; pay special attention to olivine_port_passage (warps 10 and 11 at 19,27 and 20,27) and olivine_lighthouse_1f (warp 9 at 29,27) which are adjacent on the map and must not be swapped

Verify Olivine City Rival scene: walk from Route 39 south into Olivine City; confirm SCENE_OLIVINECITY_RIVAL_ENCOUNTER fires exactly once when stepping on tile (13,12) or (13,13); confirm Rival delivers lighthouse dialogue then exits east; confirm SCENE_OLIVINECITY_NOOP advances and Rival's SWIMMER_GUY sprite appears; verify scene does NOT re-fire on subsequent visits

Verify Olivine Gym access gates: (a) EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM NOT set — Gym Guide first-state dialogue, Jasmine NPC absent; (b) flag set but EVENT_BEAT_JASMINE NOT set — Gym Guide second-state dialogue, Jasmine present at (5,3), battle initiates; (c) after EVENT_BEAT_JASMINE — Gym Guide post-badge dialogue, Mineral Badge awarded (ENGINE_MINERALBADGE), TM23 Iron Tail given (EVENT_GOT_TM23_IRON_TAIL), OlivineGymActivateRockets fires

Verify Olivine Cafe HM04 Strength: (a) EVENT_GOT_HM04_STRENGTH NOT set — Sailor delivers item-give dialogue and awards HM04; (b) flag set — Sailor gives post-give dialogue only, no duplicate item; confirm HM04 Strength appears in bag

Verify lighthouse full climb: enter 1F from Olivine City warp 9 at (29,27); climb through all 6 floors using every staircase variant; confirm warp deposit coordinates on each floor; specifically verify 2F east staircase split where row 11 goes UP to 3F but row 13 goes DOWN to 1F — this non-obvious distinction is a likely migration error

Verify 6F music: confirm upon entering olivine_lighthouse_6f the background music changes to MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY (NOT MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE); lower floors must all play MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE; music must change on floor transition

Verify SecretPotion quest chain: (a) speak to Jasmine on 6F without SECRETPOTION — confirm EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS set; (b) subsequent visits show shortened dialogue; (c) with SECRETPOTION in bag speak to Jasmine — confirm full cutscene fires (MUSIC_HEAL, FadeOutToWhite, Amphy animation, Jasmine leaves); confirm EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM set and EVENT_OLIVINE_GYM_JASMINE cleared; (d) Jasmine disappears from 6F; (e) Amphy cry changes from slow/sick (PlaySlowCry) to normal/healthy after quest

Verify Olivine Port NPC swap: (a) pre-Hall-of-Fame: Sailor guard at (7,15) blocks pier, two Fishing Gurus present; (b) post-Hall-of-Fame: Sailor boarding agent at (6,15) present, Youngster and CooltrainerF present, guard absent; verify no frame where both groups simultaneously visible; (c) approach gangway at (7,15) with S.S. TICKET on Monday/Friday post-HOF — confirm boarding sequence initiates correctly; verify EVENT_TEMPORARY_UNTIL_MAP_RELOAD_1 prevents re-boarding in same session
Verify Surf accessibility from Olivine: confirm player with Fog Badge can use Surf on water tiles at Olivine's south edge to begin Route 40 traversal

Verify connection offsets: Route 39 to Olivine City north connection at offset 5; Olivine City to Route 40 west connection at offset -9; player must walk seamlessly between maps without visible seams or passability errors at borders

source_data.area_data_summary: QA focus areas: (1) olivine_city 11 warps — especially port_passage dual warps (10,11) and lighthouse warp (9); SCENE_OLIVINECITY_RIVAL_ENCOUNTER coord event at (13,12)/(13,13). (2) olivine_gym 3-state Gym Guide dialogue; Jasmine EVENT_OLIVINE_GYM_JASMINE flag; OlivineGymActivateRockets post-badge. (3) olivine_cafe EVENT_GOT_HM04_STRENGTH idempotent delivery. (4) lighthouse 1F-2F: 2F east staircase split (row 11 up to 3F vs row 13 down to 1F); Sailor Huey phone rematch chain 4 teams. (5) lighthouse 3F-5F: SPRITE_YOUNGSTER quirk on Theo/Denis; Ether (3F)/Rare Candy+TM Swagger (5F) item balls; 9/10/7 warp counts must all resolve. (6) lighthouse 6F: MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY; Jasmine SecretPotion cutscene 3-state; Amphy PlaySlowCry vs normal cry. (7) olivine_port: pre/post-HOF NPC groups; hidden Protein at (1,22); S.S. Aqua boarding coord_event Monday/Friday schedule.

unstructured_notes: This QA sprint is the validation gate for the entire Olivine migration. The most likely migration failures are: (1) warp ID numbering mismatches between old engine and canonical JSON — any swap in the 11-warp olivine_city set will manifest as teleporting to wrong building; (2) the 2F lighthouse east staircase split (up vs down on rows 11 vs 13) — this is counterintuitive and likely to be wrong in old code; (3) MUSIC_VIOLET_CITY on 6F being normalized to MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE erroneously; (4) the Rival coord_event using tile coordinates vs block coordinates — must be tile (13,12) and (13,13). The SecretPotion quest is the critical chain: EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS must be set by 6F Jasmine dialogue before the Cianwood Pharmacy will give the SecretPotion — if this flag is missing, the player can never obtain the 6th badge. QA should NOT modify game logic — file all failures as issues for coders.
technical_debt_notes: QA sprint — verify migration/creation changes from previous two content sprints.

goal: Build Sea Routes 40-41 and Cianwood City from scratch — new content; large ocean traversal with Swimmer trainer gauntlet, Whirl Island warp stubs, Suicune/Eusine scene, Chuck gym boulder-punch intro, and SecretPotion pharmacy chain
abstract_tasks: Build route_40: 20x36-tile water route (johto tileset, MUSIC_ROUTE_36); connections (east to olivine_city offset -9; south to route_41 offset -15, requires Surf); 1 warp to route_40_battle_tower_gate at (9,5); 4 Swimmer trainers: Simon (14,15) facing right LOS 4 (2x Tentacool Lv20), Randall (18,30) facing left LOS 5 (Shellder+Wartortle+Shellder Lv18/20/18), Elaine (3,19) facing right LOS 4 (Staryu Lv21), Paula (10,25) spin_clockwise LOS 3 (Staryu+Shellder Lv19); 5 NPCs: Lass facing down (11,13), Monica (8,10) Monday-only spin_random_slow giving Sharp Beak via Route40MonicaCallback on MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS (EVENT_GOT_SHARP_BEAK_FROM_MONICA / EVENT_MET_MONICA_OF_MONDAY), Pokefan M (7,6) standing right, Lass spin_random_slow (13,4), Standing Youngster (16,9) EVENT_BATTLE_TOWER_OPEN_CIVILIANS only; 2 items: Sharp Beak (NPC gift Monica), hidden Hyper Potion bg_event (7,8) EVENT_ROUTE_40_HIDDEN_HYPER_POTION; 1 sign at (14,10); wild Surf 6% (Tentacool 90% Lv15-20 / Tentacruel 10% Lv20); fishing FISHGROUP_SHORE; 3 smashable rocks on land strip

Build route_41: 50x54-tile large ocean map (johto tileset, MUSIC_ROUTE_36, FISHGROUP_OCEAN); connections (north to route_40 offset 15 requires Surf; west to cianwood_city offset 0 requires Surf); 4 warp stubs to whirl_island_nw (12,17), whirl_island_ne (36,19), whirl_island_sw (12,37), whirl_island_se (36,45) — all require Whirlpool; 10 Swimmer trainers: Charlie (32,6) spin_random_fast LOS 3 (Shellder+Tentacool+Tentacruel Lv21/19/19), George (46,8) spin_random_fast LOS 3 (6-mon team: 4x Tentacool+Staryu+Remoraid Lv16-19), Berke (20,26) spin_counterclockwise LOS 3 (Qwilfish Lv23, after-text references silver-winged Pokemon flying from islands — Lugia lore), Kirk (32,30) spin_clockwise LOS 3 (2x Gyarados Lv20), Mathew (19,46) spin_counterclockwise LOS 3 (Krabby Lv23), Kaylee (17,4) spin_random_fast LOS 3 (2x Goldeen+Seaking Lv18/20/20), Susie (23,19) standing up LOS 3 (Psyduck+Goldeen TRAINERTYPE_MOVES), Denise (27,34) standing left LOS 3 (Seel Lv22), Kara (44,28) standing right LOS 4 (Staryu+Starmie Lv20), Wendy (9,50) spin_random_fast LOS 2 (2x Horsea TRAINERTYPE_MOVES); 1 hidden item: Max Ether bg_event (9,35) EVENT_ROUTE_41_HIDDEN_MAX_ETHER; wild Surf 6% (Tentacool 60% / Tentacruel 30% / Mantine 10% — Mantine exclusive to this route); fishing FISHGROUP_OCEAN

Build cianwood_city: 30x54-tile coastal town (johto tileset); connections (east to route_41 offset 0, requires Surf); 7 warps: manias_house (17,41), cianwood_gym (8,43), cianwood_pokecenter_1f (23,43), cianwood_pharmacy (15,47), cianwood_photo_studio (9,31), cianwood_lugia_speech_house (15,37), poke_seers_house (5,17); 6 NPCs: Youngster spin_random_slow (21,37), Pokefan M walk_left_right (17,33), Lass walk_up_down (14,42), Chuck's Wife walk_left_right (10,46 gives HM02 Fly after EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK via EVENT_GOT_HM02_FLY gate), Eusine (11,21 battle NPC EVENT_CIANWOOD_CITY_EUSINE disappears after EVENT_FOUGHT_EUSINE), Suicune (10,14 still EVENT_SAW_SUICUNE_AT_CIANWOOD_CITY); coord_event at (11,16) SCENE_CIANWOODCITY_SUICUNE_AND_EUSINE; map_callback_newmap sets ENGINE_FLYPOINT_CIANWOOD and EVENT_EUSINE_IN_BURNED_TOWER; 3 items: hidden Revive (4,19) EVENT_CIANWOOD_CITY_HIDDEN_REVIVE, hidden Max Ether (5,29) EVENT_CIANWOOD_CITY_HIDDEN_MAX_ETHER (both near Rock Smash boulders), HM02 Fly (NPC gift from Chuck's Wife); 6 smashable rocks at (8,16)/(9,17)/(4,25)/(5,29)/(10,27)/(4,19); register cianwood_pokecenter_1f as shared PokemonCenter template; register manias_house, cianwood_photo_studio, cianwood_lugia_speech_house, poke_seers_house as GenericHouse templates

Build cianwood_gym: 10x18-tile gym (gym tileset); 2 exit warps both to cianwood_city warp 2 at (4,17) and (5,17); 4 BlackBelt trainers: Yoshi (2,12) facing right LOS 3 (Hitmonlee Lv27 TRAINERTYPE_MOVES), Lao (7,12) facing left LOS 3 (Hitmonchan Lv27 TRAINERTYPE_MOVES elemental punches), Nob (3,9) facing right LOS 2 (Machop+Machoke Lv25 TRAINERTYPE_MOVES), Lung (5,5) facing left LOS 1 (2x Mankey+Primeape Lv23/23/25 TRAINERTYPE_NORMAL); gym leader Chuck at (4,1): intro animation where boulder at (5,1) slides LEFT+UP+RIGHT and disappears before battle; Chuck team: Primeape Lv27 (Leer/Rage/Karate Chop/Fury Swipes) + Poliwrath Lv30 (Hypnosis/Mind Reader/Surf/DynamicPunch) TRAINERTYPE_MOVES; Storm Badge (ENGINE_STORMBADGE) enables Fly HM and Lv70 obedience; TM01 DynamicPunch; 3 boulder puzzle items at (3,7)/(4,7)/(5,7) requiring HM04 Strength; 2 gym statues bg_events at (3,15)/(6,15) CianwoodGymStatue; post-badge OlivineGymActivateRockets pattern checking badge count

Build cianwood_pharmacy: 8x8-tile pharmacy (house tileset); 2 warps to cianwood_city warp 4 at (2,7) and (3,7); 1 NPC: Pharmacist at (2,3) facing down — 3-state: (1) EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS NOT set opens mart (Potion/Super Potion/Hyper Potion/Full Heal/Revive, MARTTYPE_PHARMACY no balls); (2) flag set and EVENT_GOT_SECRETPOTION_FROM_PHARMACY NOT set gives SecretPotion key item (SFX_KEY_ITEM sets flag); (3) SecretPotion already given opens mart; 2 bookshelf bg_events (0,1)/(1,1) DifficultBookshelfScript
Implement Eusine battle in Cianwood City: Eusine is a trainer battle NPC — verify battle class, team, and post-battle scene that removes Eusine via EVENT_FOUGHT_EUSINE

Write tests: confirm Route 40 Monica appears only on Mondays; confirm Route 41 Mantine appears in Surf encounters at 10%; confirm Cianwood City Suicune scene fires at coord (11,16) exactly once; confirm Chuck gym boulder puzzle requires HM04 Strength; confirm Chuck's Wife gives HM02 Fly only after EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK and not twice; confirm SecretPotion requires EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS

source_data.area_data_summary: route_40: 20x36 tiles mostly water, eastern land strip with Battle Tower gate, 4 Swimmers, Monica Monday-sibling Sharp Beak gift, Route40MonicaCallback MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS, hidden Hyper Potion bg_event, FISHGROUP_SHORE, Tentacool/Tentacruel Surf encounters, 3 smashable rocks. route_41: 50x54 tiles large ocean, 4 Whirl Island warp stubs at precise coordinates (NW 12,17; NE 36,19; SW 12,37; SE 36,45) all requiring Whirlpool, 10 Swimmers including 6-mon George and lore-dropping Berke (Lugia silver wings reference), Mantine 10% Surf exclusive, hidden Max Ether near SW island, FISHGROUP_OCEAN. cianwood_city: 30x54 tiles, 7 warps, Suicune/Eusine coord_event at (11,16) SCENE_CIANWOODCITY_SUICUNE_AND_EUSINE, Chuck's Wife HM02 Fly gift post-badge, 6 Rock Smash boulders hiding 2 hidden items, flypoint callback on map entry. cianwood_gym: 10x18 tiles, 4 BlackBelt trainers TRAINERTYPE_MOVES, Chuck boulder-punch intro, Primeape+Poliwrath (Mind Reader+DynamicPunch combo), Storm Badge (5th badge), TM01 DynamicPunch, 3 Strength boulder puzzle. cianwood_pharmacy: 8x8 tiles, Pharmacist 3-state SecretPotion gating, MARTTYPE_PHARMACY inventory (no Poke Balls), 2 bookshelves.

unstructured_notes: This area does not exist in the current engine and is being built fresh. No migration concerns. Key engine capability checks before starting: (1) Route 41 is the largest water route in Johto at 50x54 tiles — verify the map system supports maps this large without performance issues. (2) The Whirl Island stubs at (12,17), (36,19), (12,37), (36,45) must exist as warp events even though the Whirl Island areas are built in a later sprint (Groups 46-47). (3) Chuck's boulder-punch intro uses big_step and fast_jump_step movement commands that may require engine support verification before implementing. (4) Poliwrath's Mind Reader+DynamicPunch combination (100 base power, 100% accuracy after Mind Reader, always confuses on hit) is the most dangerous attack pattern in the gym and must execute correctly. (5) HM02 Fly from Chuck's Wife is gated on EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK and significantly changes traversal for the rest of the game. Swimmer George's 6-mon team (four Tentacool, one Remoraid, one Staryu) is the largest single trainer party on this route — verify the battle engine handles 6-mon trainer parties.
technical_debt_notes: This area does not exist in the current engine and is being built fresh.

goal: Build Route 42 Ecruteak Gate + Route 42 + Mahogany Town + Mahogany Gym from scratch — new content; east-west mountain route with Apricorn trees and Crystal Suicune encounter, arriving at the ninja hometown with its story-locked gym and Team Rocket Hideout entry point
abstract_tasks: Build route_42_ecruteak_gate: 10x8-tile gate building (gate tileset); 4 warps: (0,4)+(0,5) to ecruteak_city warps 1/2 (west doors); (9,4)+(9,5) to route_42 warps 1/2 (east doors); 1 NPC: Officer at (5,2) facing down standing, dialogue warns about Mt. Mortar maze interior; no items, no trainers; standard gate layout with window decoration on north interior wall

Build route_42: 60x18-tile east-west route (johto_outside tileset); connections (west to route_42_ecruteak_gate offset 0; east to mahogany_town offset 9; north to mount_mortar_1f_outside offset 0); 2 gate warps at (0,8)+(0,9) to route_42_ecruteak_gate warps 3/4; 3 Mt. Mortar cave stub warps at (10,5) to mt_mortar warp 1 (western), (28,9) to mt_mortar warp 2 (central), (46,7) to mt_mortar warp 3 (eastern); 3 trainers: Fisher Tully (40,10) facing left LOS 1 (Qwilfish Lv18, Pokegear rematch with escalating teams, Water Stone gift phone reward via EVENT_BEAT_FISHER_TULLY), Hiker Benjamin (51,9) spin_random_fast LOS 3 (Diglett+Geodude+Dugtrio Lv14/14/16, uses SPRITE_POKEFAN_M sprite per ASM), Pokemaniac Shane (47,8) facing down LOS 3 (Nidorina+Nidorino Lv16); 1 Crystal-only NPC: Suicune (26,16) still, coord_event at (24,14) SCENE_ROUTE42_SUICUNE triggers flee animation north-right then SCENE_ROUTE42_NOOP, advances chain to Route 36 via SCENE_ROUTE36_SUICUNE; 3 items: Ultra Ball item_ball (6,4) EVENT_ROUTE_42_ULTRA_BALL, Super Potion item_ball (33,8) EVENT_ROUTE_42_SUPER_POTION (requires Surf), hidden Max Potion bg_event (16,11) EVENT_ROUTE_42_HIDDEN_MAX_POTION; 3 Apricorn trees: Pink Apricorn (27,16) FRUITTREE_ROUTE_42_1 Kurt makes Lure Ball, Green Apricorn (28,16) FRUITTREE_ROUTE_42_2 Kurt makes Friend Ball, Yellow Apricorn (29,16) FRUITTREE_ROUTE_42_3 Kurt makes Moon Ball; 4 signs; wild grass 25% (Mankey/Mareep/Spearow/Flaaffy day-morning; Zubat replaces Spearow at night), wild Surf 15% (Goldeen/Seaking), fishing Goldeen/Magikarp

Build mahogany_town: 20x18-tile town (johto tileset); connections (north to route_43 offset 0; west to route_42 offset 0; east to route_44 offset 0); 5 warps: mahogany_mart_1f (11,7) Souvenir Shop/Rocket Hideout entrance, mahogany_red_gyarados_speech_house (17,7), mahogany_gym (6,13), mahogany_pokecenter_1f (15,13), route_43_mahogany_gate (9,1); 4 NPCs: PokeFan M RageCandyBar Merchant at (19,8) blocks east path with coord_events at (19,8)/(19,9) SCENE_MAHOGANYTOWN_TRY_RAGECANDYBAR one-time intercept, Gramps walk_left_right (6,9) two-state dialogue (pre/post Rocket Hideout), Fisher standing (6,14) EVENT_MAHOGANY_TOWN_POKEFAN_M_BLOCKS_GYM disappears when gym unlocked, Lass standing (12,8) EVENT_MAHOGANY_MART_OWNERS; flypoint callback sets ENGINE_FLYPOINT_MAHOGANY on map entry; 4 signs; register mahogany_mart_1f as shared Mart template with note that Rocket Hideout staircase concealed beneath it (EVENT_UNCOVERED_STAIRCASE_IN_MAHOGANY_MART controls visibility); register mahogany_pokecenter_1f as shared PokemonCenter template; register mahogany_red_gyarados_speech_house as GenericHouse template

Build mahogany_gym: 10x18-tile gym (ice_path tileset); 2 exit warps to mahogany_town warp 3 at (4,17) and (5,17); 5 trainers: Skier Roxanne (4,6) facing down LOS 1 (Jynx Lv28), Boarder Ronald (0,17) facing up LOS 1 (Seel+Dewgong+Seel Lv24/25/24), Skier Clarissa (9,17) facing up LOS 1 (Dewgong Lv28), Boarder Brad (5,9) facing down LOS 1 (2x Swinub Lv26), Boarder Douglas (2,4) SPRITEMOVEDATA_SPINRANDOM_FAST LOS 1 (Shellder+Cloyster+Shellder Lv24/25/24, after-text reveals Pryce meditates under waterfall daily); Gym Guide at (7,15); Gym Leader Pryce at (5,3) facing down: team Seel Lv27 (Headbutt/Icy Wind/Aurora Beam/Rest) + Dewgong Lv29 (same moves) + Piloswine Lv31 (Icy Wind/Fury Attack/Mist/Blizzard) TRAINERTYPE_MOVES; Glacier Badge (ENGINE_GLACIERBADGE) raises Special stats and enables Whirlpool HM; TM16 Icy Wind (EVENT_GOT_TM16_ICY_WIND); 2 gym statue bg_events at (3,15)/(6,15) MahoganyGymStatue checking GLACIERBADGE; ice puzzle 3 zones (south/mid/north) with stopper platforms; post-badge MahoganyGymActivateRockets fires checking VAR_BADGES

Implement Mahogany Gym ice puzzle mechanics: verify engine supports ice-floor sliding (player moves in entered direction until wall or non-ice stopper tile); implement 3 puzzle zones; verify Boarder Douglas SPRITEMOVEDATA_SPINRANDOM_FAST still has LOS 1 detection while spinning; verify Pryce raised dais at rows 1-3 is non-ice walkable
Implement Mahogany gym access gate: entrance at (6,13) in mahogany_town locked until EVENT_CLEARED_ROCKET_HIDEOUT; Fisher NPC EVENT_MAHOGANY_TOWN_POKEFAN_M_BLOCKS_GYM stands near entrance pre-unlock

Write tests: Route 42 Suicune scene fires at (24,14) in Crystal mode exactly once and SCENE_ROUTE42_NOOP prevents repeat; Mahogany Town RageCandyBar merchant intercepts player at (19,8)/(19,9) exactly once; Mahogany Gym entrance blocked until EVENT_CLEARED_ROCKET_HIDEOUT; Pryce post-battle triggers MahoganyGymActivateRockets; ice floor slides player into walls correctly; Glacier Badge enables Whirlpool HM field use; Apricorn trees give Pink/Green/Yellow per correct positions

Mortar, 4 door warps. route_42: 60x18 tiles, johto_outside tileset, 3 trainers (Tully Pokegear rematch Water Stone/Benjamin SPRITE_POKEFAN_M quirk/Shane Nidorina+Nidorino), Suicune Crystal coord_event (24,14), 3 items (Ultra Ball/Super Potion Surf-required/hidden Max Potion), 3 Apricorn trees (Pink/Green/Yellow = Lure/Friend/Moon Balls), 3 Mt. Mortar cave stubs, western pond requires Surf, 25% grass Mankey+Mareep+Spearow+Flaaffy. mahogany_town: 20x18 tiles, 5 warps, RageCandyBar one-time coord_event, gym locked EVENT_CLEARED_ROCKET_HIDEOUT, flypoint, Souvenir Shop conceals Rocket Hideout via EVENT_UNCOVERED_STAIRCASE_IN_MAHOGANY_MART. mahogany_gym: 10x18 tiles, ice_path tileset, 3-zone ice puzzle, 5 trainers (Roxanne/Ronald/Clarissa/Brad/Douglas spinner), Pryce Seel+Dewgong+Piloswine TRAINERTYPE_MOVES (Piloswine Blizzard is highest threat), Glacier Badge enables Whirlpool, TM16 Icy Wind, MahoganyGymActivateRockets narrative bridge to Radio Tower arc.

unstructured_notes: This area does not exist in the current engine and is being built fresh. Critical engine capability checks before starting: (1) does the engine support ice-floor sliding mechanics? If not this must be implemented as a new engine feature before building Mahogany Gym. (2) does the engine support Mt. Mortar cave entrance stubs that can be resolved later without breaking compilation? (3) Boarder Douglas uses SPRITEMOVEDATA_SPINRANDOM_FAST simultaneously with trainer LOS detection — verify this combination works. The Glacier Badge is the 7th Johto badge and enables Whirlpool HM — the gateway to Whirl Islands and other whirlpool-gated areas. Fisher Tully's Water Stone phone gift after Kanto rematch is one of two Water Stones available in Crystal without trading — the phone rematch system must support item gifts via event flag. Route 42's western pond (Surf-required) creates a gate for the Super Potion item ball at (33,8) — the first route item in Johto requiring Surf to collect. Hiker Benjamin's SPRITE_POKEFAN_M quirk (trainer class is HIKER but sprite is SPRITE_POKEFAN_M) must be preserved per pokecrystal source.
technical_debt_notes: This area does not exist in the current engine and is being built fresh.

goal: QA audit of Cianwood and Mahogany blocks — verify Groups 34-35 new content: sea route traversal, Chuck gym puzzle and HM chain, SecretPotion to Jasmine to Olivine Gym unlock sequence, Route 42 connections, and Mahogany Gym ice puzzle all function correctly end-to-end
abstract_tasks: Verify Surf requirement on Routes 40-41: confirm player cannot traverse Route 40 south or Route 41 without Surf (Fog Badge prerequisite); confirm Surf from Olivine City south border enters Route 40 correctly at the east connection (offset -9); confirm Route 40 south to Route 41 north connection stitches at offset -15

Verify Route 40 Monica Monday mechanic: simulate Monday visit and confirm Monica appears at (8,10) and Sharp Beak is given; simulate non-Monday visit and confirm Monica is hidden; confirm EVENT_GOT_SHARP_BEAK_FROM_MONICA prevents duplicate gift; verify Route40MonicaCallback fires on MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS correctly

Verify Route 41 traversal and Whirl Island stubs: surf across Route 41 and encounter all 10 Swimmer trainers; confirm Mantine appears in Surf encounters at approximately 10% rate; verify four Whirl Island warp stubs exist at (12,17)/(36,19)/(12,37)/(36,45) and are correctly blocked by Whirlpool requirement; confirm player cannot enter them without HM Whirlpool

Verify Cianwood City arrival and Suicune/Eusine scene: arrive at Cianwood from Route 41 west connection; confirm ENGINE_FLYPOINT_CIANWOOD set on map entry; step on coord tile (11,16) with SCENE_CIANWOODCITY_SUICUNE_AND_EUSINE active — confirm Suicune appears at shore, plays animation, leaps away; confirm Eusine appears at (11,21); confirm Eusine battle can be fought and EVENT_FOUGHT_EUSINE set on defeat; confirm Eusine disappears after scene

Verify Cianwood Gym (Chuck): confirm 3 Strength boulders at (3,7)/(4,7)/(5,7) block path to Chuck without HM04 Strength; with Strength push boulders and reach Chuck; confirm Chuck intro — boulder at (5,1) animates LEFT+UP+RIGHT and disappears before battle; confirm Poliwrath Mind Reader+DynamicPunch combo executes correctly; Storm Badge awarded (ENGINE_STORMBADGE) after victory; TM01 DynamicPunch received

Verify Chuck's Wife HM02 Fly: confirm Chuck's Wife at (10,46) gives HM02 Fly only if EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK set and EVENT_GOT_HM02_FLY not set; confirm Fly can be taught and used once Storm Badge check passes; confirm Fly allows player to return to Olivine City without Surfing back across Routes 40-41

Verify Cianwood Pharmacy SecretPotion chain: (a) visit pharmacy before speaking to Jasmine on 6F — no SecretPotion available, normal mart opens; (b) speak to Jasmine on 6F (sets EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS); (c) visit pharmacy again — pharmacist gives SecretPotion key item (SFX_KEY_ITEM) and sets EVENT_GOT_SECRETPOTION_FROM_PHARMACY; (d) pharmacy on subsequent visits opens normal mart; (e) return to Jasmine on 6F with SECRETPOTION — confirm cutscene fires and EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM set

Verify Olivine Gym unlocks after SecretPotion delivery: enter Olivine Gym with EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM set; confirm Jasmine present at (5,3); defeat Jasmine (Magnemite x2 Lv30 + Steelix Lv35 with Iron Tail); confirm Mineral Badge awarded (ENGINE_MINERALBADGE) and TM23 Iron Tail given

Verify Route 42 traversal: enter from Ecruteak City east gate; walk Route 42 east; confirm western pond requires Surf to fully cross (hidden Max Potion at 16,11 unreachable without Surf); confirm 3 trainer battles fire correctly; confirm Apricorn trees at (27-29,16) give Pink/Green/Yellow Apricorn; confirm 3 Mt. Mortar cave stubs do not crash

Verify Mahogany Town: arrive from Route 42 east; confirm flypoint set; confirm RageCandyBar merchant intercepts at (19,8)/(19,9) exactly once; enter Mahogany Gym — confirm entrance blocked by Fisher NPC until EVENT_CLEARED_ROCKET_HIDEOUT; confirm Souvenir Shop warp leads to mahogany_mart_1f (Rocket Hideout staircase not yet visible)

Verify Mahogany Gym ice puzzle: navigate south zone (Ronald at west/Clarissa at east); slide north to first stopper; navigate mid zone (Brad on central platform); navigate north zone (Douglas spinning/Roxanne on platform); reach Pryce's raised dais; defeat Pryce (Seel+Dewgong+Piloswine — confirm Piloswine Blizzard is highest threat); confirm Glacier Badge awarded (ENGINE_GLACIERBADGE) and TM16 Icy Wind given; confirm Whirlpool HM can now be used outside battle; confirm MahoganyGymActivateRockets fires correctly

Verify Fly HM after Storm Badge: confirm player can use Fly to return to Olivine City after obtaining Storm Badge in Cianwood; confirm this allows the SecretPotion delivery without Surfing back across Routes 40-41

source_data.area_data_summary: QA focus areas: (1) Routes 40-41: Surf gate, Monica Monday callback, Mantine 10% encounter, 4+10 Swimmer trainers, 4 Whirl Island stubs at precise tile coordinates requiring Whirlpool. (2) Cianwood City: coord_event (11,16) Suicune scene, Eusine battle, Chuck's Wife Fly gift gate (EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK + EVENT_GOT_HM02_FLY). (3) Cianwood Gym: 3 boulder puzzle (Strength required), Chuck intro boulder animation, Poliwrath Mind Reader+DynamicPunch, Storm Badge, TM01. (4) Cianwood Pharmacy: 3-state Pharmacist (pre-jasmine-talk / with-jasmine-event / post-given), SecretPotion key item delivery, MARTTYPE_PHARMACY no Poke Balls. (5) Olivine Gym unlock: EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM gates Jasmine, Mineral Badge, TM23 Iron Tail, OlivineGymActivateRockets. (6) Route 42: gate Officer NPC, western pond Surf gate, Suicune Crystal coord at (24,14), 3 Apricorn trees, Tully Pokegear rematch Water Stone. (7) Mahogany Town: RageCandyBar one-time coord, gym locked EVENT_CLEARED_ROCKET_HIDEOUT, flypoint. (8) Mahogany Gym: 3-zone ice puzzle, Douglas spin LOS 1, Pryce Piloswine Blizzard, Glacier Badge Whirlpool, MahoganyGymActivateRockets.

unstructured_notes: This QA sprint covers entirely new content (Groups 34-35). The most critical end-to-end sequence to verify is the SecretPotion chain: Surf to Cianwood, speak to Jasmine on 6F (sets EVENT_JASMINE_EXPLAINED_AMPHYS_SICKNESS), Pharmacy gives SecretPotion, return to Olivine, deliver to Jasmine, EVENT_JASMINE_RETURNED_TO_GYM set, Olivine Gym battle available, Mineral Badge. If any link in this chain is broken the player cannot obtain the 6th badge. The Fly shortcut (Storm Badge, Chuck's Wife gives Fly, fly back to Olivine) is a key quality-of-life feature that must work to avoid forcing the player to Surf back across Routes 40-41. For Mahogany Gym ice puzzle QA should specifically verify ice-floor sliding stops correctly at stopper tiles — a common implementation bug causes over-sliding into walls preventing reaching Pryce. Boarder Douglas spin_random_fast with LOS 1 is the highest-risk trainer in the gym for unexpected battle triggers — verify he can only initiate battle from adjacent tiles. QA should NOT modify game logic — report all failures as filed issues for coders.
technical_debt_notes: QA sprint — verify migration/creation changes from previous two content sprints.
